metadata.description: Claude Code skills by Jay Fox — context-window guardrail and smart session continuation

plugins.name: pause-claude-code
plugins.description: PreToolUse hook that warns and then blocks tool calls when the context window approaches its limit, preventing mid-task session death.

plugins.name: plan-next
plugins.description: Smart session-continuation skill. Reads your plan file and session history to auto-detect the next stage and begin it immediately.
